seo.title: BioWikiPro — QC/QA Pharma knowledge platform
seo.description: From Senior QC to QA Manager: 78 in-depth GMP lessons (free to start), the GMP Audit Survival Kit, and a career toolkit for QC/QA Pharma & Life Science professionals.

hero.subtitle: In-depth GMP knowledge, audit-prep tools, and a real promotion roadmap — for QC/QA professionals in Pharma & Life Science.

problems.heading: Sound familiar?
problems.subtitle: Common struggles of Senior QC/QA after 3–5 years

items.title: Stuck at Senior QC for too long?
items.desc: Experienced and doing well — but unsure what else it takes to convince your boss to promote you to Supervisor or Manager.

items.title: Audit coming, team not ready?
items.desc: No concrete checklist, gaps in SOPs, the team freezes when auditors ask. Stress every audit season.

items.title: Gaps in your GMP knowledge?
items.desc: You know the practice but lack a systematic framework — hard to explain during audits or interviews.

items.title: Academy
items.desc: 70 in-depth lessons on GMP, sterility testing, OOS investigation, Annex 1, CAPA — dozens free, with advanced deep-dives on Pro.

items.title: GMP Audit Survival Kit
items.desc: SOP gap analysis, CAPA templates, audit interview scripts, mock audit walkthrough + 30-min consulting call.

items.title: Career Hub
items.desc: The path from QC Analyst to QA Director — real salaries, required skills, and target employers.

banner.title: GMP Audit Survival Kit
banner.desc: The most complete toolkit to prepare for a GMP audit: SOP gap analysis, 10 CAPA templates, 50+ interview Q&A scripts, mock audit walkthrough + 30-min 1-on-1 consulting.

trust.heading: Written by someone who's been on both sides
trust.body: BioWikiPro is built by Henry — a Sales Manager in Industrial Microbiology who works directly with the QC labs of Pharma & F&B plants. The content isn't textbook theory — it's what Henry sees teams actually need when an audit arrives.
features: Content aligned with GMP WHO 2023 & Annex 1 2022
Written by someone with real experience on both the QC and vendor sides
Focused on the Pharma & F&B market
No empty theory — frameworks you can apply right away

latest.heading: Fresh from the library
latest.subtitle: Free, in-depth lessons and articles — updated regularly.

finalCta.heading: Start today — free
finalCta.subtitle: Dozens of Academy lessons fully open, free. No credit card required.
